title: Created Coins
description: Coins for a player-driven economy with Create.
body:
Coins for a player-driven economy. Uses Create (the forward port, Create Fly) and overrides the Ironworks requirement with own items if Ironworks isn't present.

### Making coins

Create coins from their corresponding nugget in a Mechanical Press.

### Ironworks anticompat

Bronze crafting is identical to Ironworks (tin+copper heated mixing).
Tin is an alloy of iron and glowstone dust.
